title: FutuRaM WEEE dismantling protocol
author: Hu, Han-jung
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: A dismantling protocol version 2 for collecting WEEE composition data, developed for use within the FutuRaM project as a supplement to the Composition Data Collection Template – Product-Centric Approach. The protocol can also be applied to other dismantling activities. Please follow the instructions in the PDF file to fill data in the protocol.
steps_raw: A dismantling protocol version 2 for collecting WEEE composition data, developed for use within the FutuRaM project as a supplement to the Composition Data Collection Template – Product-Centric Approach. The protocol can also be applied to other dismantling activities. Please follow the instructions in the PDF file to fill data in the protocol.
